sqlMap.select: select StateCode,CountryKey,StateDesc,IsBusinessActive,IsBusinessActiveLW,IssueMailLwy,IssueMailAcc,IsStateReferred,ShowCityDropDown,IsStateReferredFQ from State order by statedesc
select StateCode,StateDesc from State order by statedesc
select * from State order by statedesc
select StateDesc as LicensedStates,StateDesc from State order by LicensedStates,StateDesc;
select statecode as LicensedStates, statecode as StateDesc from State order by LicensedStates,StateDesc
sqlMap.insert: insert into State(StateCode StateDesc IsBusinessActive IsBusinessActiveLW IssueMailLwy IsStateReferredFQ IsStateReferred ShowCityDropDown CountryKey ) values (#StateCode# #StateDesc# #IsBusinessActive# #IsBusinessActiveLW# #IssueMailLwy# #IsStateReferredFQ# #IsStateReferred# #ShowCityDropDown# #CountryKey# )
sqlMap.select: select StateCode, StateDesc, IsBusinessActive, IsBusinessActiveLW, IssueMailLwy, IsStateReferredFQ, IsStateReferred, ShowCityDropDown, CountryKey from State where StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.update:
update State set
StateDesc = #StateDesc# StateDesc = null IsBusinessActive = #IsBusinessActive# IsBusinessActive = null IsBusinessActiveLW = #IsBusinessActiveLW# IsBusinessActiveLW = null IssueMailLwy = #IssueMailLwy# IssueMailLwy = null IsStateReferredFQ = #IsStateReferredFQ# IsStateReferredFQ = null IsStateReferred = #IsStateReferred# IsStateReferred = null ShowCityDropDown = #ShowCityDropDown# ShowCityDropDown = null CountryKey = #CountryKey# CountryKey = null
where StateCode = #StateCode#
sqlMap.select: select StateCode, StateDesc, IsBusinessActive, IsBusinessActiveLW, IssueMailLwy, IsStateReferredFQ, IsStateReferred, ShowCityDropDown, CountryKey from State where StateCode = #StateCode#
select StateCode, StateDesc, IsBusinessActive, IsBusinessActiveLW, IssueMailLwy, IsStateReferredFQ, IsStateReferred, ShowCityDropDown from State where CountryKey = #CountryKey#
select StateCode,CountryKey,StateDesc,IsBusinessActive,IsBusinessActiveLW,IssueMailLwy,IssueMailAcc,IsStateReferred,ShowCityDropDown,IsStateReferredFQ from State order by StateDesc
select StateCode,StateDesc from State order by StateDesc
select StateDesc as InstitutionState,StateDesc from State order by StateDesc
select StateDesc as FPLStateCode,StateDesc from State order by StateDesc;
